about.title: ABOUT
about.description: I'm a web developer based in Brazil, passionate about building clean, functional applications. My focus is on backend systems with PHP and Laravel, while also working with JavaScript and Vue.js on the front end. I'm currently expanding into modern full-stack development and always looking for new challenges to grow.

list.title: Cafe Management System
list.description: A small set of classes developed in UpInside's Full Stack PHP Developer training, designed for integration into a SaaS platform webservice. It aims to manage cafe products and orders.

list.title: Game Group
list.description: Study project of a social network for gamers. Technologies include PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, and HTML/CSS.

list.title: Junior Developer III - PagHiper
list.description: Working as a backend-focused developer on payment solutions, primarily involving Pix and internal financial systems. Responsible for building and maintaining APIs, handling transaction flows, and developing scalable features that support real-time payment processing. Also involved in improving internal tools and creating efficient solutions to optimize financial operations.

list.title: IT Intern - Grupo Brotas
list.description: Worked with technical support, hardware and software maintenance, and network administration. Also responsible for managing the company's social media.

list.title: Scientific Initiation Scholar (PIBIC) - IFPR
list.description: Developed a technology showcase system for IFPR, focusing on log auditing and data integrity.

list.title: President - Interact Club of Terra Rica
list.description: Led a youth team in social impact projects, organized fundraising events, and represented the club in regional activities.

education.title: EDUCATION
education.description: My academic background and complementary courses that shape my technical foundation.

list.title: Software Engineering
list.description: Currently in the second year, focusing on computing fundamentals and engineering principles.

list.title: Technical Degree in Informatics
list.description: Technical education focused on software development, networking, and hardware.

list.title: Cisco Networking Academy
list.description: Training in computer networks, including topology, protocols, and security.

list.title: NDG Linux Unhatched
list.description: Training in Linux system administration and fundamentals.

list.title: Rotary Youth Leadership Awards (RYLA)
list.description: Recognition for leadership and community engagement.

list.title: Full Stack PHP Development
